Club insights by organisation

Each org tab pairs the usage trend with a plain-language club insight and a simple next step based on the workflow data shown.

Sydney Grammar School

May 2026 usage is up vs Apr 2026. 3,726 actions from 6 active users across 4 active teams.

Club insight
Upload and curation are active, but no dashboards were created in May. The workflow is moving, but not ending in saved analysis.
Next step
Focus the next conversation on turning session work into saved dashboards or reusable reporting views.

This standalone export is built directly into the HTML file, so the visualisations render when the file is opened in a browser. The structure, chart titles, KPI labels, and club-by-club layout were aligned to the dashboard view.
